appliedUpdates.description: Added Validation Concurrency guidance plus a dedicated Flow Validator Guidance: jvm-tests section for auth-merge-gate-hardening so future validators serialize Maven runs unless they isolate build outputs.

environmentConstraints: This milestone used the `jvm-tests` surface only; no compose runtime services were required because every assertion mapped to deterministic Maven suites or gate scripts.
`AuthTenantAuthorityIT` full-class execution remains known-bad for unrelated scenarios on this branch, so only the milestone-relevant method was executed per mission guidance.

`artifacts/gate-fast/changed-coverage.json` stayed in compatibility mode (`passes: false`, `vacuous_reason: coverage_skipped_files`), but `bash scripts/gate_fast.sh` still exited 0 and reported `[gate-fast] OK` as documented in mission guidance.
